subject: fix(burger-menu): route errors to debug, remove redundant outside click
body:
handleItem now catches action errors and routes them to debugLog() so
failures surface in the debug pill. Removed redundant handleOutsideClick
document listener — the backdrop @click="close" already covers all
outside clicks. Removed unused onMounted import. Build verified.

Tags: burger-menu, debug, cleanup, glow-props-sync
